data.title: KKR Acquires 25% Stake In Enilive, Supporting Eni's Push For Energy Transition
data.description: Eni & KKR shares up premarket as KKR acquires 25% stake in Enilive for $3.172B, improving Eni's capital structure and supporting energy transition.
